title: GregTech Placeable Emitters
description: This mod makes GregTech's emitters placeable in-world. When powered, placed emitter blocks shoot beam that transfers energy to the machine it hits.
body:
This is a GregTech addon mod that makes the "Emitter" items placeable in-world. When powered, placed emitter blocks shoot beam that transfers energy to the block it hits.

![Demo Screenshot](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/41f0200fe725b763a8f0cd190e62b6e59817da55.png)

All tiers of emitters transfer at the rate of 1 A. When idling, they still drain 1 EU/t. There is currently no distance-based loss and no range limit, besides that beams stop at unloaded chunks.

The angle of placed emitters can be adjusted in its GUI. However, they can't bend more than 90° away from their default direction.

![Angle Adjustment UI](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ed72781197ca3e2041cc43be6e5bb5fe1506667a.png)

Demo Video:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/7J9h1FhvdlU" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

Feel free to redistribute or use in any modpack.
